results.title: Patrick Mahomes, Chiefs reportedly agree to reworked contract valued at more than $500 million in NFL first
results.description: Patrick Mahomes will now be under contract with the Chiefs through the 2033 campaign.

results.title: FIFA chief Infantino defends visa handling, ticket prices on eve of World Cup
results.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino defended the way soccer's governing body had handled visa issues ahead of the World Cup, saying on Wednesday that it was working to find solutions but could not ​override government decisions.

results.title: Somali referee Omar Artan receives Canadian World Cup offers after U.S. border denial
results.description: Somali referee Omar Artan was denied entry to the United States and sent back home, but Canadian officials in Toronto and Vancouver are now stepping up to offer him a chance to officiate at the FIFA World Cup

results.title: Patriots minicamp recap: Intensity dialed down on Day 2
results.description: The New England Patriots continued their final week of their offseason program on Wednesday with Day 2 of mandatory minicamp. While intensity levels were dialed down, there were still things to take away from the session. Here’s what went down on the lower practice field in a hot Foxboro day.
